query: Figure out whether this machine has Nix and flakes set up before I rely on it.
expected_behavior: Runs scripts/nix-detect and reads its JSON output rather than probing ad-hoc.
Output is a single JSON object with exactly the keys: nix_available, flakes_enabled, is_nixos, is_flake_project, flake_path.
Does not crash when nix is absent (all booleans false, flake_path empty).
When run inside a flake checkout, reports is_flake_project=true and a non-empty flake_path.
baseline_without_skill: Runs several separate `command -v nix` / `nix flake --help` probes and summarizes in prose, with no machine-readable result.
